key_assumption: Excess mass relative to smooth counterfactual

detail: Joint pre-trend interaction test p = 0.7810 across 2 pre-treatment periods (no evidence against parallel trends)
E-value = 4.94: confounder must have RR > 4.94 with both treatment and outcome to explain away the effect
Maximum absolute standardized mean difference = 0.4867 (>= 0.1 threshold)
Propensity-score ranges of treated and control groups overlap
McCrary density test p = 0.8711 (no evidence of manipulation)
